zh.Saltfleet, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾薩爾特福利特
zh.lifeSummary: Alice Adrian Adryan於1180年出生在英國林可爾史爾薩爾特福利特。她與Andrew Newcomben結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.Saltfleet, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾薩爾特福利特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Adrian Adryan于1180年出生在英国林可爾史爾薩爾特福利特。她与Andrew Newcomben结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Adryan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, French, German, Polish, and Romanian: from a vernacular form of the Latin personal name Adrianus (Hadrianus), originally an ethnic name denoting someone from the coast of the Adriatic (Latin Adria). It was borne by several minor early Christian saints, in particular a martyr at Nicomedia (died c. 304), the patron saint of soldiers and butchers. Later, the name was adopted by several popes, including the only pope of English birth, Nicholas Breakspear, who reigned as Adrian IV (1154–59).

variants.name: Adriance
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch Adriaanse: patronymic from the Dutch form of the personal name Adrian , meaning ‘son of Adriaan’.
History: Adriaanse was a frequent name in New Netherland in the 17th century.

variants.name: Adrien
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Emile, Flore, Francois, Gaspard, Henri, Jacques, Jean-Claude, Magalie, Yolette.
French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the personal name Adrien, French form of Latin (H)adrianus (see Adrian ).

variants.name: Aten
meanings: Dutch (mainly Groningen): patronymic from the personal name Ate or Aat, shortened forms of Adriaan (see Adrian ), or from the Frisian personal name Ate, a shortened form of an ancient Germanic name based on the element ad (short form of adal ‘noble’), such as Adolf . Compare Auten .
History: The first Aten known in America was Adriaen Hendrickse Aten (sometimes recorded as Arie Hendrickse) who came to New Netherland (now NY) from Doesburg in Gelderland, the Netherlands, in 1651.

variants.name: Adriano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Felipe, Carlos, Fernando, Manuel, Adriana, Alejandro, Almario, Apolonia, Araceli, Celso, Edgardo.  Italian Antonio, Eliseo, Filippo, Mino, Romeo.
Spanish and Italian: from the personal name Adriano (see Adrian ).

variants.name: Arians
meanings: German: from a vernacular form of the Latin personal name Hadrianus (see Adrian ).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Adrian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of the Latin name Hadrianus ‘man from Hadria’. Hadria was a town in northern Italy, which gave its name to the Adriatic Sea; it is of unknown derivation. The initial H- has always been very volatile. The name was borne by the Roman emperor Publius Aelius Hadrianus , during whose reign ( ad 117–138 ) Hadrian's Wall was built across northern England. The name was later taken by several early popes, including the only English pope, Nicholas Breakspeare (Adrian IV). It was in early use among immigrants from the Low Countries, and is found in some English regions from the mid-16th century. It has enjoyed considerable popularity in the English-speaking world since the late 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Adrian Adryan was born in 1180, in Saltfleet, Lincolnshire, England. She married Andrew Newcomben. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Adrian Adryan est née en 1180, à Saltfleet, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Andrew Newcomben. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Alice Adrian Adryan wurde 1180 in Saltfleet, Lincolnshire, England geboren. Sie hat Andrew Newcomben geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Alice Adrian Adryan è nata il nel 1180 nel Saltfleet, Lincolnshire, England. Lei sposato Andrew Newcomben. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Saltfleet, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイアサルトフリート
ja.lifeSummary: Alice Adrian Adryanは1180年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアサルトフリートで生まれた。Andrew Newcombenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Adrian Adryan(은)는 1180년 영국 링코실르 살트플릿에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Andrew Newcomben(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice Adrian Adryan nasceu em 1180, em Saltfleet, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Andrew Newcomben. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Adrian Adryan родилась в 1180 г. в местности салтфлит, линколншир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew Newcomben. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Alice Adrian Adryan nació en 1180, en Saltfleet, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Andrew Newcomben. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en su pueblo.
